query:
SELECT 
  DATE(dataFollowUp) as data,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM follow_ups
WHERE corretorId = 1 AND status = 'pendente'
GROUP BY DATE(dataFollowUp)
ORDER BY data DESC
LIMIT 10;
